title: micropyxis pumila
intro: Micropyxis pumila, also known as Dwarf Horsetail, is a small, perennial plant species belonging to the family Equisetaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Micropyxis pumila include its ability to help manage urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared for herbal use by drying the leaves and stems, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures.
